Repository Structure

* Docs-only repository for requirement gathering artifacts.
* PRDs are under `docs/requirement-gathering/ProductRequirements`.
* Stakeholder interview prompts are under `docs/requirement-gathering/interview-questions`.

Documentation Instructions

* Keep PRDs aligned to interview-question source files and include a `Source` section.
* Use measurable requirement identifiers (for example `FR-*` and `NFR-*`) and explicit acceptance criteria.
* Include assumptions, dependencies, risks, and mitigations when requirements are ambiguous.
* Prefer additive, surgical documentation updates; do not rewrite unrelated stakeholder artifacts.
* For this repository, maintain assignment alignment to AI-assisted engineering expectations and production-readiness criteria (reasoning, validation, security, and operational considerations).
